title: Pentadenia trollii
taxonomy: Pentadenia trollii is classified within the family Apocynaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Pentadenia. Pentadenia trollii is a species within the genus. Its classification is further detailed as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Clade - Angiosperms, Clade - Eudicots, Clade - Asterids. This classification places Pentadenia trollii within the broader context of flowering plants.
uses: Pentadenia trollii has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its roots and leaves are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
